title: Air quality assessment around Netherlands airports
summary: A demonstrator combining CAMS air quality forecasts and Sentinel-5P observations to assess air quality impacts in the vicinity of major Dutch airports.
narrative:
## What it does
This demonstrator overlays CAMS European air quality model output with Sentinel-5P/TROPOMI NO2 and particulate observations around airport catchment areas in the Netherlands, giving airport operators and regulators a combined modelled-and-observed picture of local air quality.

## Why it matters
Airports sit under increasing regulatory scrutiny on local air quality (recast Ambient Air Quality Directive, ICAO environmental reporting). Combining modelled forecasts with satellite observations lets operators distinguish background air quality trends from airport-attributable contributions, and supports compliance reporting without standing up dedicated ground monitoring networks everywhere.

## Status
This is a placeholder entry describing a demonstrator concept; no live instance is published yet.
